overall.description: Gameplay footage from Assassin's Creed Mirage showing a hooded protagonist exploring a medieval Baghdad setting. The character moves through ornately decorated interior rooms with Islamic tilework and carpets, transitions to a sunlit marketplace courtyard, enters a building with interior water features, and navigates a crowded outdoor carpet market.

scene_state.functional_zone: decorated interior rooms with ornate carpets and pottery

agents.ego_description: walking steadily through furnished interior rooms, examining the ornate decorations and pottery displays

entered.detail: richly patterned red and gold carpets covering the floor
large metallic urns and pottery arranged on shelves
intricate geometric and floral tile patterns in blue and terracotta
dark wooden door frame leading to adjacent room

segments.scene_description: The segment opens in a richly decorated interior space with ornate carpets, brass pottery, and walls covered in intricate Islamic tilework. The character walks through narrow enclosed rooms with warm artificial lighting, passing wooden furniture and archways.

scene_state.functional_zone: sunlit marketplace courtyard with stone buildings

events.description: character exits the interior building into bright outdoor courtyard
lighting shifts from warm artificial interior to bright natural sunlight

agents.ego_description: stepping out of the building into the sunlit courtyard and walking through the marketplace

notable_agents.action: crowd of townspeople in medieval dress walking and gathering in the courtyard

entered.detail: sunlit sandy stone ground of the open courtyard
market stalls with red fabric canopies and wooden frames
rectangular stone water feature in the courtyard center
tall palm trees visible above the building rooftops

segments.scene_description: The character exits the building into a bright sunlit courtyard with sandy ground and stone architecture. The scene opens up to full sky visibility with market stalls visible to the left and a crowd of NPCs walking through the space. The lighting shifts dramatically from warm interior to harsh natural sunlight.

scene_state.functional_zone: interior courtyard with water pools and stone benches

events.description: character enters building with interior water features and lattice windows
lighting becomes dimmer and more diffused as character moves indoors

agents.ego_description: walking into the interior courtyard building, passing by water features and stone benches

notable_agents.action: individual standing near the wall observing the water pool

entered.detail: rectangular stone pool with clear water reflecting light from above
low stone seating arranged along the tiled walls
decorative wooden lattice screens allowing patterned light to enter
metal lanterns suspended from the ceiling

segments.scene_description: The character enters an interior courtyard building featuring water pools, stone benches, and lattice windows. The space is semi-covered with partial sky visibility, creating mixed lighting conditions with sunlight filtering through openings. The environment is quieter with sparse NPC presence compared to the bustling outdoor market.

scene_state.functional_zone: outdoor carpet market with vendors and shoppers

events.description: character exits the water feature building back into the open market area
crowd density increases significantly as character enters the carpet market area

agents.ego_description: navigating through the crowded carpet market, walking past vendors and shoppers examining rugs

notable_agents.action: vendor in purple robes standing near rolled carpet displays
group of shoppers sitting and examining carpets laid on the ground

entered.detail: market area with colorful carpets and rugs displayed on the ground
large rolled rugs stacked and arranged for sale
wooden construction scaffolding near the stone building entrance
red and beige fabric awnings providing shade for market stalls

segments.scene_description: The character exits back into the bright outdoor market, entering a dense carpet bazaar area. The ground is covered with displayed rugs and rolled carpets while crowds of NPCs browse the merchandise. The scene features high crowd density with scattered pedestrian flow among the market stalls and historic stone architecture.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement from the intimate, ornate interiors of a residence into the bustling, sun-drenched public markets of Baghdad. It begins within richly decorated rooms filled with brass pottery and intricate Islamic tilework, moving through narrow archways under warm artificial lighting. As the character exits the building, the scene opens abruptly into a bright, sandy courtyard where the lighting shifts to harsh natural sunlight and the space fills with a crowd of pedestrians. The camera then transitions into a semi-covered interior courtyard featuring tranquil water pools and filtered light before turning back toward the outdoors. Finally, the environment expands into a dense carpet bazaar, where the ground is covered in colorful rugs and the crowd density peaks among the historic stone architecture.
